Date: Thu, 08 Feb 2024 08:10:11 -0800
Subject: 5 Marines aboard helicopter that crashed outside San Diego confirmed dead
Message-ID: <65c4fce5.050a0220.5375e.4e55SMTPIN_ADDED_BROKEN@mx.google.com>
Content-Type: text/html; charset="utf-8"

            <tr>
                <td id="Summary12171034" align="left" style="padding: 0px 20px 11px 20px; font-family: Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif; font-size: 18px; color: #333333; text-decoration: none; line-height: 1.3;">

                            A ground and air search effort came to an end on Thursday morning after five U.S. Marines were confirmed dead.
                    </a>
                </td>
            </tr>
            <tr>
                <td height="25" align="left">
                    <table style="margin: 0px 20px 15px 37px;">

<td id="Card12171038" class="container GridSmall" width="295" height="240" style="background-color: #FFFFFF; vertical-align: top; ">

    <table width="295" height="100%" align="center" style="height: 100%; background-color: #FFFFFF; " cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0">
        <tbody>
            <tr height="160" style="box-shadow: 0px 5px 0px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); ">
                <td>
                    <a id="Href12171038" style="color: #333333;border: none;text-decoration: none;" href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?&d=AIAADPHEP5AY6B4KDRW5HHV7G7IHTOG7Y7MYOJMUAH6TA4VWFTKMPYIVWK4SO24CO6I6VS4D2UM6XGJ6J63LPXK7JUFKHIO77OD42UF2V7RLNRC6TSXRR3MUJIHV3VGFT433AMATW2H22ZRD4K3N43JWOHYCI4ATU5NORE7XVXEUGFB5PA2PCHXI&" target="_blank">

            </tr>

            <tr style="height: 100%;">
                <td id="Title12171038" style="padding: 10px 10px 0px 10px; font-family: Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif; font-size: 15px; color: #333333; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: top; background-color: #FFFFFF;" width="295" height="40">
                    <a id="Href12171038" style="color: #333333;border: none;text-decoration: none;" href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?&d=AIAADVNOHPOTT52LVIJTA26OKJF3WP437S2NY66EQII2NYAAODWIJGOMI7AJB34PUE2NTHHO3JQO3CXNFWS3WOEOYAT2LKFDQOXSP45AWKHSNRVDNBSYT2KSXY2MZCCI53F2ARDOI5G3WQHSMO4S6VNVGFVRVXQNBDHXZEA4O2V5YBBKPHF7JXQ4&" target="_blank">
                        Another struggling fast-food operator files Chapter 11 bankruptcy
                    </a>
                </td>
            </tr>

            <tr height="35">
                <td align="left">
                    <table style="margin: 5px 0px 8px 10px;">
                        <tbody>
                            <tr>
                                <td id="ProviderName12171038" height="45" style="font-family: Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif;color: #666666; font-size: 15px; text-decoration: none; line-height: 20px; height: 20px; border: none;">

                                        TheStreet
                                    </a>
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                        </tbody>
                    </table>
                </td>
            </tr>
        </tbody>
    </table>

</td>

                                </tr>
                            </table>
                        </td>
                    </tr>
<tr>
    <td height="12"></td>
</tr>

<tr>
    <td align="center">
        <br>
        <div align="center" style="font-family:Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif;font-size: 20px; font-weight:normal;">

</tr>
